ad_copy.body_copy: Premium architecture designed for life. We blend artistry with precision to create spaces you'll love for generations. Discover the WECRAFT difference.

visual_direction.layout_description: A striking, high-resolution image of a modern architectural exterior. Focus on clean lines, natural light, and high-quality materials. The image should fill most of the 1080x1080 space, with a subtle gradient overlay in #1f1f1f at the bottom for text placement.
visual_direction.composition: Central focus on the architectural structure, with a slight upward angle to emphasize height and grandeur. Minimal surrounding elements to avoid distraction.
visual_direction.color_usage: Dominantly utilize the natural tones of the building materials. Incorporate #e6d5c3 as a subtle accent color in the landscaping or interior visible through windows. #351e1c for text and subtle shadows.
visual_direction.typography_usage: Headline in Archivo Medium, bold and prominent. Body copy in Inter Regular, smaller and more readable. CTA button in a contrasting color (e.g., a lighter shade of #e6d5c3) with clear typography.
visual_direction.imagery_style: Photorealistic, architectural photography. Focus on detail, texture, and lighting. Avoid overly stylized or artificial effects.
visual_direction.mood: Sophisticated, elegant, and trustworthy. Evoke a sense of quality, permanence, and refined taste.

image_generation_prompt.stable_diffusion: photorealistic architectural photography, modern minimalist house exterior, large windows, natural light, clean lines, high-quality materials, warm color palette, subtle landscaping, 8k, detailed, professional, architectural digest, trending on archdaily, --ar 1:1 --style expressive
image_generation_prompt.midjourney: /imagine modern minimalist house exterior, large windows, natural light, clean lines, high-quality materials, warm color palette, subtle landscaping --ar 1:1 --v 5 --style raw
image_generation_prompt.negative_prompt: people, cars, clutter, unrealistic, cartoon, painting, sketch, low resolution, blurry

zones.bottom: Headline, Body Copy, CTA Button (Dark Gradient Overlay)

layout_spec.spacing_notes: Maintain a safe zone of 80px from all edges. Padding between headline and body copy: 10px. CTA button should have sufficient padding around the text.

brand_compliance_notes: The campaign adheres to WECRAFT's professional and premium brand personality. The color palette and typography are consistent with brand guidelines. The imagery focuses on high-quality architecture, reinforcing the value proposition of premium design.
ab_testing_tips: Test different headlines and body copy variations to see which resonate best with the audience. Experiment with different CTA button colors and text. Monitor click-through rates and engagement metrics to optimize the campaign.
